text.title: Lookalike and Retargeting Audience Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Lookalike and Retargeting Audience Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: seed_audiences populated with a typed value
exclusions populated with a typed value
lookalike_config populated with a typed value
overlap_report populated with a typed value
frequency_caps populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
